title: Venice Biennale Bars Awards for Countries Facing Crimes Against Humanity Charges
summary_full: The jury said it would “refrain from considering” countries whose leaders are facing charges of crimes against humanity, which would affect Israel and Russia.
summary_public: The jury said it would “refrain from considering” countries whose leaders are facing charges of crimes against humanity, which would affect Israel and Russia.
